taxonomy: Callista pandurata is classified within the phylum Mollusca, class Gastropoda, order Littorinimorpha, and family Calliidae. This classification places it as a type of marine snail. The phylum Mollusca includes a wide range of invertebrate animals, including snails, slugs, clams, and squids.
